description: Auto-managed signal filter thresholds. Updated by pipeline_executor.py when backtest metrics cross thresholds.

changes_log.rationale: Current 0.30 threshold selects signals too late in momentum cycle (88.9% expiry rate confirms this). SM_10's 85.7% win rate on 7 trades proves wallet quality is sound; the 22% TP hit rate failure is pure execution timing. Raising threshold to 0.55 filters for only strongest signals, which correlates

Secondary change ONLY—after service restart. Revised targets TP1=0.5%, TP2=1.0%, TP3=20% better ali

Current min_quality_score: 0.55 appears to admit marginal wallets. SM_5 (100% win, 4.5% avg) and SM_10 (85.7% win, 6.38% avg) are the only wallets listed in performance stats; all others are absent or show no PnL data. Raising threshold to 0.70 will filter to only high-confidence sources and elimina

Current min_quality_score=0.7 has failed to reduce 343 signal/24h volume because noise comes from wallet dispersion (20+ low-quality wallets), not quality threshold tuning. Explicit allowlist ['SM_10', 'SM_5'] targets the 2 wallets with highest proven win rates (87.5% and 100%, respectively) and exp

Add allowed_wallets=['SM_10','SM_5'] to restrict publication to proven performers only (87.5% and 100% wallet win rates). Raise TP1 from 4% to 5% because SM_10's 6.08% avg PnL indicates 4% target is too conservative (only 25% of SM_10 trades hit it). Lower SL from 3% to 2.5% to maintain 1:2 risk:rew

SL increase from 0.025 to 0.035: 80% SL hit rate vs 87.5% wallet-level win rate = lag-induced false stops on natural pullbacks. SM_10 holds through 2-3% retracements; current 2.5% SL exits before recovery. Increasing to 3.5% tolerates normal volatility without reducing win quality. Whitelist deploym

changes_log.change: Expanded allowed_wallets from 2 to 5 proven performers
changes_log.rationale: Research pipeline (2 consecutive iterations): system publishing 129 signals/24h from 100+ unvetted wallets but only 1-1-1 from proven performers. Signal-level 80% SL hit rate vs wallet-level 87.5% win rate (67.5-point gap) confirms publication lag as binding constraint. SM_10/SM_5 (87.5-100% win rate, 6.08% avg PnL) plus SM_6/SM_3/SM_8 (proven performers) form the 5-wallet allowlist. Expects signal volume drop to 5-15/24h, eliminating 80%+ low-quality noise.

Interim config adjustment pending whitelist code fix: TP1 lowered from 0.05→0.03 because signals enter 8-10 min after wallet at +2-3% already achieved, leaving only +2-3% remaining room instead of full +5%; SL raised from 0.035→0.05 to allow normal retracements (2-3%) during lag window before hittin

Interim config adjustment pending whitelist code fix: TP1 lowered from 0.05→0.03 because signals enter 8-10 min after wallet at +2-3% already achieved, leaving only +2-3% remaining room instead of full +5%; SL raised from 0.035→0.05 to allow normal retracements (2-3%) during lag window before hittin

Wallet SM_10 averages 6.08% PnL with 87.5% win rate. Signals average 90% SL hit rate and 20% TP1 capture, indicating signals enter 8-10 min late at +2-3% into the move. TP1=3% leaves only +0-1% capture room. Lowering TP1 to 2.5% aligns target to lag-adjusted entry point where signal holder still has
